ThemeModel.schema: {name: string, primary: hex, secondary: hex, background: hex, textPrimary: hex, textSecondary: hex, buttonTextColor: hex, button_text_color: hex, defaultFont: string, font_family: string, globalBgImageUrl: url, globalBgColorHex: hex, category: string, description: string}
ThemeModel.ai_when_to_use: Global page theme — applies to ALL sections unless overridden per-block.
ThemeModel.ai_avoid_when: Always include a theme. Omit only for surgical edits that do not change colors.

hero.schema: {title, subtitle, button_text, button_url, image_url, vertical_padding: 0-300, variant: 0-2, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color: hex, theme_override: string, bg_blur: 0-20, animation: {type: "fadeIn"|"slideUp"|"zoomIn"|"bounceIn", duration: ms, delay: ms, intensity: 0.1-2.0}}
hero.ai_when_to_use: Use once near the top to express the core offer, audience, CTA, and primary image.
hero.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if hero_saas is more appropriate (software, dashboard products). Never use two hero blocks on one page.

hero_saas.schema: {title, subtitle, button_text, button_url, image_url, vertical_padding: 0-300, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
hero_saas.ai_when_to_use: Use for software, dashboards, apps, subscriptions, and B2B technology offers.
hero_saas.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for physical products, restaurants, clinics. Use hero for general business pages.

features.schema: {title, layout_style: "grid"|"bento", variant: 0-2, items: [{title, description, image_url, link_url}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
features.ai_when_to_use: Use to translate product/service capabilities into user benefits, usually 3 to 6 items.
features.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for very simple pages with only 1-2 key benefits; use hero subtitle instead.

products.schema: {title, layout_style: "grid_2"|"grid_3"|"list"|"carousel", whatsapp_number, mobile_columns: 1|2, show_category_filter: bool, categories: [string], items: [{id, name, price, description, image_url, button_text, purchase_url, category}], card_style: "classic"|"modern"|"minimal", hover_effect: "none"|"scale"|"elevate"|"glow", stagger_animations: bool, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
products.ai_when_to_use: Use for stores, menus, packages, property units, service bundles, or any sellable item list.
products.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if there is only 1 product — use featured_product instead.

featured_product.schema: {name, price, description, image_url, button_text, badge_text, layout_style: "split"|"centered"|"reversed", whatsapp_number, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
featured_product.ai_when_to_use: Use to highlight a best-seller, a specific high-value product, or a primary offer.
featured_product.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if the catalog has 4+ items — use products instead.

bento_store.schema: {title, items: [{name, price, image_url}], layout_style: "modern"|"tight"|"glass", whatsapp_number, hover_effect: "none"|"scale"|"elevate"|"glow", stagger_animations: bool, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
bento_store.ai_when_to_use: Use for visual brands that want a magazine-style product display.
bento_store.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for simple or text-heavy pages; use products or featured_product instead.

pricing (v1 - legacy).schema: {title, schema_version: 1, variant: 0-2, items: [{name, price, features: [string], is_popular: bool}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}

pricing.schema: {title, subtitle, schema_version: 2, has_toggle: true, variant: 0-2, toggle_labels: {monthly: "شهري", yearly: "سنوي"}, items: [{plan_id, name, prices: {monthly: num, yearly: num}, currency, periods: {monthly, yearly}, discount_mode: "hidden"|"auto"|"manual", manual_discount_text, features: [string], button_text, button_action_type: "link"|"checkout", button_action_value, is_popular}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
pricing.ai_when_to_use: Use for subscription tiers, service packages, course plans, memberships, and clear price comparison.
pricing.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if the product/service has a single fixed price with no tiers.

testimonials.schema: {title, items: [{author, role, quote, image_url}], layout_style: "cards"|"carousel", bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
testimonials.ai_when_to_use: Use when the user mentions reviews, clients, success stories, outcomes, or trust-building.
testimonials.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if the page lacks real customer data or is purely transactional.

faq.schema: {title, items: [{question, answer, image_url}], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
faq.ai_when_to_use: Use near the end to answer objections about pricing, delivery, refunds, booking, eligibility, or support.
faq.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for very short pages or if the offer is self-explanatory.

gallery.schema: {title, display_mode: "grid"|"carousel"|"masonry", grid_columns: 1-6, items: [image_url_string], gallery_links: [url_string], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
gallery.ai_when_to_use: Use for portfolios, properties, menus, salon results, event photos, venues, and product detail visuals.
gallery.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if there are fewer than 3 images.

contact_info.schema: {title, email, phone, location, phone_icon, email_icon, location_icon, card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
contact_info.ai_when_to_use: Use for physical businesses, service providers, clinics, offices, and pages that need final contact clarity.
contact_info.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if contact info is already in the footer or a lead form is present.

video_embed.schema: {title, subtitle, video_url, aspect_ratio: "16:9"|"4:3"|"1:1"|"9:16", max_width, use_thumbnail: bool, thumbnail_url, autoplay: bool, show_controls: bool, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
video_embed.ai_when_to_use: Use for demos, trailers, course previews, property tours, testimonials, and product explainers.
video_embed.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if no video URL is available or the page is text-only.

logo_header.schema: {title, logo_url, logo_height: num, alignment: "left"|"center"|"right", bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}
logo_header.ai_when_to_use: Use as the first block when the prompt mentions a brand, store, clinic, agency, or formal company header.
logo_header.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for personal pages, creators, or when the hero already contains the brand name.

lead_form.schema: {title, button_text, whatsapp_auto_open: bool, whatsapp_number, whatsapp_message_template, fields: [{field_id, field_type: "text"|"email"|"phone"|"textarea"|"select", label, placeholder, is_required: bool, options: [{value, label}], validation: {min_length}}], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
lead_form.ai_when_to_use: Use when the user needs a short contact, callback, demo, or newsletter form.
lead_form.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if the service requires multi-step qualification — use multi_step_lead_form instead.

lead_magnet.schema: {title, subtitle, button_text, image_url, whatsapp_auto_open, whatsapp_number, fields: [same as lead_form], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
lead_magnet.ai_when_to_use: Use for free guides, coupons, catalogs, reports, checklists, or downloadable resources.
lead_magnet.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if there is no gated offer (free download, coupon, etc.).

multi_step_lead_form.schema: {title, subtitle, success_message, enable_local_save: bool, schema_version, whatsapp_auto_open, whatsapp_number, steps: [{step_id, step_title, fields: [same as lead_form]}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
multi_step_lead_form.ai_when_to_use: Use for quotes, bookings, eligibility checks, real estate inquiries, medical appointments, or complex lead qualification.
multi_step_lead_form.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for simple contact gathering — use lead_form instead.

working_hours.schema: {title, schedule: {day_label: "time_range"}, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}
working_hours.ai_when_to_use: Use for restaurants, clinics, salons, stores, gyms, events, and appointment-based businesses.
working_hours.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for online-only businesses or SaaS products without physical hours.

location_map.schema: {title, address, map_iframe_url, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}
location_map.ai_when_to_use: Use when the prompt includes an address, branch, venue, showroom, clinic, restaurant, or event location.
location_map.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for online-only businesses without a physical location.

trust_logos.schema: {title, items: [logo_image_url_string], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
trust_logos.ai_when_to_use: Use after the hero when the prompt mentions clients, partners, certifications, press, or credibility.
trust_logos.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if no recognizable brand logos are available.

animated_counter.schema: {title, items: [{value, label, prefix, suffix}], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
animated_counter.ai_when_to_use: Use for measurable claims such as customers, years, projects, savings, success rates, or capacity.
animated_counter.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if no verifiable numbers are available.

social_qr.schema: {title, subtitle, links: [{platform: "website"|"instagram"|"facebook"|"twitter"|"linkedin"|"whatsapp", url, image_url}], card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
social_qr.ai_when_to_use: Use when the prompt mentions Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, social follow, or creator profiles.
social_qr.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for formal business pages that already use contact_info.

qr_code.schema: {title, subtitle, qr_payload, qr_size: 100-350, card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
qr_code.ai_when_to_use: Use for events, menus, flyers, storefronts, check-in, registration, and shareable offline access.
qr_code.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for standard landing pages without an offline component.

whatsapp.schema: {title, phone_number, message, button_text, card_style, hover_effect, stagger_animations, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
whatsapp.ai_when_to_use: Use for MENA businesses, urgent booking, product orders, support, or when the prompt includes a WhatsApp number.
whatsapp.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for non-MENA businesses or where WhatsApp is not the primary communication channel.

basic_section.schema: {title, layout_direction: "column"|"row", spacing: 0-100, vertical_padding, main_axis_alignment: "start"|"center"|"end"|"spaceBetween", cross_axis_alignment: "start"|"center"|"end"|"stretch", elements: [{id, type: "text"|"image", content, url, width, height, fit, style_overrides: {}}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
basic_section.ai_when_to_use: Use when the user asks for a unique composition that does not map cleanly to a specialized section.
basic_section.ai_avoid_when: Always prefer a specialized section type over basic_section.

statistics_grid.schema: {title, subtitle, items: [{value, label, icon}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
statistics_grid.ai_when_to_use: Use to showcase company growth, satisfied customers, or project impact.
statistics_grid.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if animated_counter is already used on the same page.

team_members.schema: {title, subtitle, items: [{name, role, bio, image_url, socials}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
team_members.ai_when_to_use: Use for about us pages or to humanize the brand/business.
team_members.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for solo creators or pages without team photos.

service_steps.schema: {title, subtitle, items: [{title, description}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
service_steps.ai_when_to_use: Use to simplify complex services into easy steps (1, 2, 3).
service_steps.ai_avoid_when: Avoid for very simple processes that can be explained in the hero or features.

cta_banner.schema: {title, subtitle, button_text, button_url, secondary_button_text, secondary_button_url, bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding, animation: {type, duration, delay, intensity}}
cta_banner.ai_when_to_use: Use at the end of the page or between sections to drive immediate action.
cta_banner.ai_avoid_when: Avoid as the very first section. Use near the bottom or as a mid-page break.

comparison_table.schema: {title, subtitle, plans: [{name, price}], features: [{name, values: [bool_per_plan]}], bg_image_url, bg_overlay_opacity: 0-1, bg_overlay_color, bg_color, theme_override, bg_blur, vertical_padding}
comparison_table.ai_when_to_use: Use to highlight differences between service tiers or product models.
comparison_table.ai_avoid_when: Avoid if pricing section already covers the comparison.
